steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The example—”people tend to find paintings featuring blues and greens more appealing”—reveals that the blank must describe how certain colors positively affect viewers' preferences.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
”Attractive to” directly expresses this: colors more attractive to viewers are naturally more appealing, matching the example. The other choices either describe unrelated effects (confusing, corrected) or contradict the passage's emphasis on preference differences (similar).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
